package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAsyncConcurrencyChannelBufferTooSmallForKnownBurst() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_channel_buffer_too_small_for_known_burst"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag channels created with no or tiny buffer despite a known burst size."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
